```diff
    updated_at: string;
  };
+ 
+ type TestRun = {
+   uuid: string;
+   test_names: string[];
+   passed: number;
+   failed: number;
+   created_at: string;
+ };
+ 
+ // Helper function to format relative time
+ function formatRelativeTime(dateString: string): string {
+   const date = new Date(dateString.replace(" ", "T"));
+   const now = new Date();
+   const diffInSeconds = Math.floor((now.getTime() - date.getTime()) / 1000);
+ 
+   if (diffInSeconds &lt; 60) {
+     return "just now";
+   }
+ 
+   const diffInMinutes = Math.floor(diffInSeconds / 60);
+   if (diffInMinutes &lt; 60) {
+     return diffInMinutes === 1 ? "1 minute ago" : &#96;${diffInMinutes} minutes ago&#96;;
+   }
+ 
+   const diffInHours = Math.floor(diffInMinutes / 60);
+   if (diffInHours &lt; 24) {
+     return diffInHours === 1 ? "1 hour ago" : &#96;${diffInHours} hours ago&#96;;
+   }
+ 
+   const diffInDays = Math.floor(diffInHours / 24);
+   if (diffInDays &lt; 7) {
+     return diffInDays === 1 ? "yesterday" : &#96;${diffInDays} days ago&#96;;
+   }
+ 
+   const diffInWeeks = Math.floor(diffInDays / 7);
+   if (diffInWeeks &lt; 4) {
+     return diffInWeeks === 1 ? "last week" : &#96;${diffInWeeks} weeks ago&#96;;
+   }
+ 
+   const diffInMonths = Math.floor(diffInDays / 30);
+   if (diffInMonths &lt; 12) {
+     return diffInMonths === 1 ? "last month" : &#96;${diffInMonths} months ago&#96;;
+   }
+ 
+   const diffInYears = Math.floor(diffInDays / 365);
+   return diffInYears === 1 ? "last year" : &#96;${diffInYears} years ago&#96;;
+ }
  
  type TestsTabContentProps = {
```

```diff
@@ -218,4 +218,53 @@
      };
    }, [showTestDropdown]);
+ 
+   // Fetch past test runs
+   useEffect(() =&gt; {
+     const fetchPastRuns = async () =&gt; {
+       if (!backendAccessToken) return;
+ 
+       try {
+         setPastRunsLoading(true);
+         const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
+         if (!backendUrl) {
+           throw new Error("BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set");
+         }
+ 
+         const response = await fetch(
+           &#96;${backendUrl}/agent-tests/agent/${agentUuid}/runs&#96;,
+           {
+             method: "GET",
+             headers: {
+               accept: "application/json",
+               "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+               Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96;,
+             },
+           }
+         );
+ 
+         if (response.status === 401) {
+           await signOut({ callbackUrl: "/login" });
+           return;
+         }
+ 
+         if (!response.ok) {
+           // Silently handle errors for past runs - it's not critical
+           console.error("Failed to fetch past runs");
+           return;
+         }
+ 
+         const data = await response.json();
+         setPastRuns(data.runs || []);
+       } catch (err) {
+         console.error("Error fetching past runs:", err);
+       } finally {
+         setPastRunsLoading(false);
+       }
+     };
+ 
+     if (agentUuid &amp;&amp; backendAccessToken) {
+       fetchPastRuns();
+     }
+   }, [agentUuid, backendAccessToken]);
  
    // Filter out tests already attached to the agent
```

```diff
+                         className="w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer"

+           {/* Right Panel - Past Runs */}

+             {/* Past Runs Header */}
+             &lt;div className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-border bg-muted/30"&gt;
+               &lt;h3 className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground"&gt;Past runs&lt;/h3&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             {/* Past Runs List */}
+             &lt;div className="overflow-y-auto max-h-[500px]"&gt;
+               {pastRunsLoading ? (
+                 &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-center py-8"&gt;
+                   &lt;svg
+                     className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin text-muted-foreground"
+                     fill="none"
+                     viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                   &gt;
+                     &lt;circle
+                       className="opacity-25"
+                       cx="12"
+                       cy="12"
+                       r="10"
+                       stroke="currentColor"
+                       strokeWidth="4"
+                     &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+                     &lt;path
+                       className="opacity-75"
+                       fill="currentColor"
+                       d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+                     &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+                   &lt;/svg&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               ) : pastRuns.length === 0 ? (
+                 &lt;div className="py-8 text-center"&gt;
+                   &lt;p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                     No test runs yet
+                   &lt;/p&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               ) : (
+                 pastRuns.map((run) =&gt; (
+                   &lt;div
+                     key={run.uuid}
+                     className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-border last:border-b-0 hover:bg-muted/20 transition-colors"
+                   &gt;
+                     &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2"&gt;
+                       &lt;span className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground truncate"&gt;
+                         {run.test_names.length === 1
+                           ? run.test_names[0]
+                           : &#96;${run.test_names.length} tests&#96;}
+                       &lt;/span&gt;
+                       &lt;span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground whitespace-nowrap"&gt;
+                         {formatRelativeTime(run.created_at)}
+                       &lt;/span&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-2"&gt;
+                       {run.passed &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (
+                         &lt;span className="inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium bg-green-500/20 text-green-500"&gt;
+                           {run.passed} Success
+                         &lt;/span&gt;
+                       )}
+                       {run.failed &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (
+                         &lt;span className="inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium bg-red-500/20 text-red-500"&gt;
+                           {run.failed} Fail
+                         &lt;/span&gt;
+                       )}
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 ))
+               )}
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
        )}
```

The implementation is complete. I've added the "Past runs" panel to the Tests tab with the following changes:

1. **Added types and helper function:**
   - `TestRun` type for past test run data
   - `formatRelativeTime()` function for displaying relative time (e.g., "6 days ago", "last week")

2. **Added state and data fetching:**
   - `pastRuns` state to store the test runs
   - `pastRunsLoading` state for loading indicator
   - `useEffect` to fetch past runs from `/agent-tests/agent/{uuid}/runs`

3. **Updated UI layout:**
   - Changed to a two-column layout (`flex gap-6`)
   - Left panel: Tests table with icons for edit, type (tool/clock), run, and delete buttons
   - Right panel: "Past runs" panel (320px width) showing:
     - Test name (or "N tests" if multiple tests were run together)
     - Relative time (e.g., "6 days ago")
     - Success/Fail badges with counts (green for success, red for fail)

The implementation matches the design shown in the image, with the tests table on the left and the past runs panel on the right side.

```diff
@@ -1092,4 +1092,42 @@
  
  **Key difference:** Results are at the **top level** (not nested under &#96;results&#96;).
+ 
+ | Endpoint                   | ID Field  | Results Location               |
+ | -------------------------- | --------- | ------------------------------ |
+ | &#96;GET /jobs&#96;                | &#96;uuid&#96;    | &#96;results.provider_results&#96;     |
+ | &#96;GET /tts/evaluate/{uuid}&#96; | &#96;task_id&#96; | &#96;provider_results&#96; (top-level) |
+ | &#96;GET /stt/evaluate/{uuid}&#96; | &#96;task_id&#96; | &#96;provider_results&#96; (top-level) |
+ 
+ ### Agent Test Runs API Response Structure
+ 
+ The &#96;GET /agent-tests/agent/{uuid}/runs&#96; endpoint returns test run history:
+ 
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;json
+ {
+   "runs": [
+     {
+       "uuid": "f54adc70-53a1-486e-a4de-ce8078b47598",
+       "name": "Run 1",
+       "status": "done",
+       "type": "llm-unit-test",  // or "llm-benchmark"
+       "updated_at": "2026-01-17 06:30:55",
+       "total_tests": 2,
+       "passed": 1,
+       "failed": 1,
+       "results": [...],  // Only for llm-unit-test
+       "model_results": null,  // Only for llm-benchmark
+       "leaderboard_summary": null,
+       "error": null
+     }
+   ]
+ }
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ **Key fields:**
+ 
+ - &#96;name&#96;: Run display name (e.g., "Run 1", "Benchmark 1")
+ - &#96;type&#96;: &#96;"llm-unit-test"&#96; (regular test runs) or &#96;"llm-benchmark"&#96; (model comparison)
+ - &#96;passed&#96;/&#96;failed&#96;: Counts for &#96;llm-unit-test&#96; type; &#96;null&#96; for &#96;llm-benchmark&#96;
+ - &#96;model_results&#96;: Array of per-model results for benchmarks (contains nested passed/failed per model)
  
  | Endpoint                   | ID Field  | Results Location               |
```

</details>

</tool-use>
